# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

services:
  - name: service1
    url: http://service1:8080
  - name: service2
    url: http://service2:8080

routes:
  - name: route1
    service: service1
    paths:
      - /api/service1
    methods:
      - GET
      - POST
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 100
          hour: 1000
          
  - name: route2
    service: service2
    paths:
      - /api/service2
    methods:
      - GET
      - POST
    plugins:
      - name: request-termination
        config:
          status_code: 400
          body: '{"error": "Bad Request"}'   

plugins:
  - name: cors
    service: service1
    config:
      origins: 
        - '*'
      methods: 
        - GET
        - POST
      headers: 
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
      exposed_headers: 
        - X-Custom-Header
      max_age: 3600

  - name: cors
    service: service2
    config:
      origins: 
        - '*'
      methods: 
        - GET
        - POST
      headers: 
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
      exposed_headers: 
        - X-Custom-Header
      max_age: 3600
